caption: The scene takes place in a large sports stadium, characterized by tiered red seating and bright overhead stadium lighting. In the foreground, several individuals are present; one person wears a blue shirt and is seated near some technical equipment, while others in orange clothing are positioned further to the left. Above the seating area, a large white banner displays the text "PULEVA" in red capital letters. Other visible signs include "OLIVA" and "CERVEZAS ALHAMBRA." A logo featuring a crown and stylized letters is visible in the upper right of the stands. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains relatively static, capturing a wide shot of the stands. The people in the scene remain in their positions with minimal movement, and the overall lighting and environment stay consistent across the frames.
